original_question: For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up time by treatment arm?
gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Type of follow-up given" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Minimum';

query_1.question: What are the distinct treatment regimens used in Melanoma trials?
query_1.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';

query_2.question: For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up duration for the Rx arm by treatment regimen?
query_2.sql: SELECT "Treatment regimen", MIN("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx") FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' GROUP BY "Treatment regimen";

query_3.question: For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up duration for the Control arm by treatment regimen?
query_3.sql: SELECT "Treatment regimen", MIN("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control") FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' GROUP BY "Treatment regimen";

query_4.question: For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up duration for Overall by treatment regimen?
query_4.sql: SELECT "Treatment regimen", MIN("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall") FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' GROUP BY "Treatment regimen";

query_5.question: For Melanoma trials, which authors have minimum follow-up?
query_5.sql: SELECT "Author" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Minimum';

original_question: Find Phase 3 Ipilimumab trials in Melanoma that were follow-up publications?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';

query_1.question: What trials have Name of ICI equal to 'Ipilimumab'?
query_1.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';

query_2.question: What trials have Cancer type equal to 'Melanoma'?
query_2.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';

query_3.question: What trials have Trial phase equal to 'Phase 3'?
query_3.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

query_4.question: What trials have Originial publication or Follow-up equal to 'Follow-up'?
query_4.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

original_question: Find phase 2 clinical trials for Urothelial cancer that compared immunotherapy to anti-VEGF therapy?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Control arm" = 'Placebo';

query_1.question: Retrieve NCT, Author, Year, Originial publication or Follow-up, Trial phase, Control arm, Cancer type, and Treatment regimen for trials where Cancer type = 'Urothelial'.
query_1.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial';

query_2.question: Retrieve NCT, Author, Year, Originial publication or Follow-up, Trial phase, Control arm, Cancer type, and Treatment regimen for trials where Trial phase = 'Phase 2'.
query_2.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

query_3.question: Retrieve NCT, Author, Year, Originial publication or Follow-up, Trial phase, Control arm, Cancer type, and Treatment regimen for trials where Control arm = 'Placebo'.
query_3.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Placebo';

original_question: Find trials for hepatocellular cancer that report median follow-up duration in months for both treatment and control arms?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

query_1.question: NCT identifiers for hepatocellular cancer trials reporting median follow-up
query_1.sql: SELECT "NCT" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

query_2.question: Authors for hepatocellular cancer trials reporting median follow-up
query_2.sql: SELECT "Author" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

query_3.question: Years for hepatocellular cancer trials reporting median follow-up
query_3.sql: SELECT "Year" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

query_4.question: Originial publication or Follow-up field for hepatocellular cancer trials reporting median follow-up
query_4.sql: SELECT "Originial publication or Follow-up" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

query_5.question: Type of follow-up given for hepatocellular cancer trials reporting median follow-up
query_5.sql: SELECT "Type of follow-up given" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

query_6.question: Cancer type values for hepatocellular cancer trials reporting median follow-up
query_6.sql: SELECT "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

query_7.question: Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx for hepatocellular cancer trials reporting median follow-up
query_7.sql: SELECT "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

query_8.question: Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control for hepatocellular cancer trials reporting median follow-up
query_8.sql: SELECT "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

original_question: Which phase 3 prostate cancer trials compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy plus anti-EGFR therapy?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate';

query_1.question: What are the Phase 3 trials for prostate cancer?
query_1.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

query_2.question: Which Phase 3 prostate cancer trials compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy plus anti-EGFR therapy?
query_2.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen", "Control regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL AND "Control regimen" LIKE '%chemotherapy%' AND "Control regimen" LIKE '%anti-EGFR%';

original_question: List Avelumab trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer with overall follow-up longer than 10.6 months?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 10.6;

query_1.question: What are the NCT numbers for trials where Name of ICI is Avelumab?
query_1.sql: SELECT "NCT" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Avelumab';

query_2.question: What are the NCT numbers for Avelumab trials with cancer type esophageal cancer or gastroesophageal junction cancer?
query_2.sql: SELECT "NCT" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Avelumab' AND ("Cancer type" = 'esophageal cancer' OR "Cancer type" = 'gastroesophageal junction cancer');

query_3.question: What are the NCT numbers for Avelumab trials with esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer and follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall greater than 10.6?
query_3.sql: SELECT "NCT" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Avelumab' AND ("Cancer type" = 'esophageal cancer' OR "Cancer type" = 'gastroesophageal junction cancer') AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 10.6;

original_question: Find phase 3 urothelial cancer trials comparing immunotherapy to tyrosine kinase inhibitors?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

query_1.question: What trials in the clinical_trials table have Cancer type equal to 'Urothelial'?
query_1.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial';

query_2.question: What trials in the clinical_trials table have Control arm equal to 'Chemo'?
query_2.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

original_question: Which phase 3 trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer compared immunotherapy to a vaccine, excluding trials with chemotherapy as the control arm?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

query_1.question: Phase 3 trials for Esophageal/GEJ cancer.
query_1.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

query_2.question: Phase 3 esophageal/GEJ trials with an immunotherapy agent.
query_2.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL;

query_3.question: Among those, trials that compare immunotherapy to a vaccine.
query_3.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL AND ("Type of control" = 'Vaccine' OR "Control arm" LIKE '%vaccine%');

query_4.question: Exclude trials with chemotherapy as the control arm among the immunotherapy-vaccine Phase 3 esophageal/GEJ trials.
query_4.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL AND ("Type of control" = 'Vaccine' OR "Control arm" LIKE '%vaccine%') AND ("Type of control" NOT LIKE '%chemotherapy%' AND "Control arm" NOT LIKE '%chemotherapy%');

original_question: Find trials for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer that use Tremelimumab in combination with other treatments?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';

query_1.question: What trials have Name of ICI equal to Tremelimumab?
query_1.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Tremelimumab';

query_2.question: Among Tremelimumab trials, which have Monotherapy/combination = Combination?
query_2.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Tremelimumab' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

query_3.question: Among Tremelimumab combination trials, which have Cancer type = Non-Small Cell Lung?
query_3.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Tremelimumab' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';

query_4.question: What is the Type of combination used in Tremelimumab combination trials for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer?
query_4.sql: SELECT "Type of combination" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Tremelimumab' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';
